locationInfo: Type in the name of the location where the event takes place
locationSub: If no location matches the name, add a new location by clicking on 'Create a new location'
title: Title
descriptionPurpose: Description for short or list displays
descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of your event
imageInfo: Load an image of at least 300 pixels width
longDescriptionPlaceholder: Type in a detailed description of your event.
keywordsPlaceholder: Separate each keyword with tabs or commas
keywordsSub: Keywords are useful for search features
registrationSub: Separate each item with tabs or commas
noDates: At least one timing must be defined
categoriesInfo: These are used to index your event in the agenda. Pick one.
defaultTagGroupInfo: These are used to index your event in the agenda. You can select several.
requiredTagError: You must select at least one item
compulsoryNote: Fields marked with a * must be filled
